ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seats" (
  "seat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seat */,
  "lodge" INTEGER /* The lodge or section of the concert hall */,
  "row" INTEGER /* The row number within the lodge */,
  "number" INTEGER /* The seat number within the row */,
  "seat_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seat type */,
  "price" TEXT /* The price of the seat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seats_lodge FOREIGN KEY ("lodge") REFERENCES lodges ("lodge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lodges" (
  "lodge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lodge */,
  "lodge_name" TEXT /* Name of the lodge */,
  "hall_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the concert hall */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lodge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lodges_hall_id FOREIGN KEY ("hall_id") REFERENCES concert_halls ("hall_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concert_halls" (
  "hall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concert hall */,
  "hall_name" TEXT /* Name of the concert hall */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the concert hall */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hall_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seat_types" (
  "seat_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seat type */,
  "seat_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the seat type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seat type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "hall_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the concert hall */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performing artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_hall_id FOREIGN KEY ("hall_id") REFERENCES concert_halls ("hall_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "seat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seat sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_seat_id FOREIGN KEY ("seat_id") REFERENCES seats ("seat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "loyalty_tier" TEXT /* Loyalty tier of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of last purchase */,
  "total_spend" TEXT /* Total spend by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price adjustment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "lodge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lodge */,
  "adjustment_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage adjustment to the seat price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_adjustments_lodge_id FOREIGN KEY ("lodge_id") REFERENCES lodges ("lodge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_adjustments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_ticketing" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale via external service */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "seat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seat sold */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the external ticketing service */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_ticketing_seat_id FOREIGN KEY ("seat_id") REFERENCES seats ("seat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_ticketing_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event schedule */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "setup_start" TEXT /* Setup start time */,
  "setup_end" TEXT /* Setup end time */,
  "event_start" TEXT /* Event start time */,
  "event_end" TEXT /* Event end time */,
  "teardown_start" TEXT /* Teardown start time */,
  "teardown_end" TEXT /* Teardown end time */,
  "sound_check" TEXT /* Sound check time */,
  "rehearsal_time" TEXT /* Rehearsal time */,
  "event_day_staff" TEXT /* Event day staff assignments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Review text provided by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code for the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_promotions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "contact_details" TEXT /* Contact details of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original ticket sale */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date of the refund */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the refund */,
  "refund_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_refunds_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES ticket_sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date of the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_type" TEXT /* Type of inquiry */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_inquiries_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "seat_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seat type */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_seat_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("seat_type_id") REFERENCES seat_types ("seat_type_id")
)
